steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The question asks which choice "indicates the size of the Coachella Valley NWR." Only one note provides a size measurement: the refuge encompasses 3,592 acres. The correct answer must include that figure.

steps.title: Test each choice for the size measurement
steps.content:
A correct answer must state the acreage; any choice that omits it fails the goal.
  • Choice A — 'The Coachella Valley NWR is a natural area in California, home to the Coachella Valley fringe-toed lizard.': mentions the species and location but includes no size measurement. ✗
  • Choice B — 'A protected natural area, the Coachella Valley NWR encompasses 3,592 acres of land in California.': directly states the 3,592-acre size, fulfilling the goal. ✓
  • Choice C — 'The Coachella Valley NWR is a protected natural area managed by the US Fish & Wildlife Service, which limits human activities there.': focuses on management and activity restrictions; no acreage given. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Home to the Coachella Valley fringe-toed lizard, California's Coachella Valley NWR is managed by the US Fish & Wildlife Service.': mentions the species and manager but omits the size. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
